# <Project Name> Roadmap

## Purpose
This roadmap captures the major delivery slices for the project without turning into a task-by-task implementation plan.

## Principles
- Organize around user value and workflow completeness.
- Keep milestones traceable to requirements.
- Use ADRs for major decision shifts.
